news.headline: Ancient China lavish toilet routines: nobles used silk, Empress Cixi had 28 maids to serve her
news.summary:

news.headline: ‘Sawadeekowloon’: mural celebrates Thai culture in Hong Kong under renovation scheme
news.summary:

news.headline: Indonesian fisherman nets surprise catch – a Chinese underwater drone
news.summary:
A Chinese underwater drone was caught by an Indonesian fisherman near a key waterway leading to Australia on Monday, local media reported.

news.headline: Trump threats against civilian targets put military in legal, moral quandary
news.summary: President Donald Trump said the United States would target “every” Iranian bridge and power plant. Experts say such blanket action violates international law.
